phase: Phase 3 - Query scope reduction post corpus rebuild (2026-05-22) and Azure subsample (2026-05-26)
justification: Scope reduction post-corpus rebuild (Fase 2). Las 6 queries referenciaban Kubernetes upstream o CNCF projects cuyo corpus se eliminó en este rebuild. Eliminadas para mantener coherencia entre queries y corpus indexable. Las queries multi-cloud que también incluían AWS/Azure/GCP (q186, q194, q200) se eliminan completas en lugar de re-taggearse para evitar ambigüedad de evaluación: el sujeto principal de esas queries es Kubernetes-native o CNCF-specific, no AWS/Azure/GCP, por lo que re-tagging crearía mismatch question vs corpus.

queries.question: How to update Kubernetes Pods without downtime?
What is the CNCF equivalent or standard for service mesh across cloud providers?
What CNCF projects are used for observability across cloud platforms?
What is the Kubernetes-native approach to secrets management vs cloud provider solutions?
What CNCF graduated projects are most commonly used in multi-cloud deployments?
Compare the Kubernetes ingress controller options across cloud providers and CNCF projects
